title: codonopsis viridis var. hirsuta
intro: Codonopsis viridis var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy or green Codonopsis, is a variety of the Codonopsis plant, a type of flowering plant in the Campanulaceae family. The medicinal properties of Codonopsis viridis var. hirsuta are attributed to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Codonopsis viridis var. hirsuta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
